rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDUARDA O. BUTAC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Determination Of Heirship
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/20/2022 (no earlier date available). 1) No courtesy copy of the amended petition has been received. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) Although the amended petition will not be fully reviewed until after all required papers have been received, a preliminary review indicates that the following issues must be addressed: i) The name and date of death of the decedent's spouse must be provided. ii) The names and dates of death of the decedent's parents must be provided. iii) The name and address of a personal representative of each post-deceased heir's estate, together with a copy of court-appointment documentation, must be provided. If no personal representative has been appointed, the names and addresses of all successors in interest under the laws of each post-deceased heir's domicile must be provided, together with an explanation of application of governing law. If the petitioner and administrator anticipate that such successors in interest will proceed under Probate Code section 11802(c), their affidavits or declarations under section 13101 must be on file.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF EVA SMALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Borrow Funds And Execute Promissory Note And Deed Of Trust For Reverse Mortgage
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the conservator should be authorized to negotiate an Equity Elite Reverse Mortgage loan under the best terms available at closing, to execute a promissory note, a deed of trust, and any other documents required to obtain the loan and, specifically to negotiate a reverse mortgage adjustable rate, negative amortized loan secured against the conservatorship estate's real property located at 366 Sayer Street, San Francisco, California. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES RUTH HIGGINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/12/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The I&A filed on 12/14/21 showed a total of $195,559.24, not $196,059.24. Notice must also be given to the Director of Health Care Services, if the decedent was the surviving spouse of a person who received Medi-Cal benefits. The petition is missing the other disclosures required to be made, pursuant to Probate Code Sections 1064 and 9202(b) as well as CRC 7.550(b). Attorney costs must be itemized. For example, the filing fee for the initial petition filed on 11/12/20 was $450.00, not $570.00. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/1/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDVIN PETER OLSEN JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/26/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please provide the legal basis and explain why 475 Justin Dr. San Francisco is included as a probate asset of this estate when the deed attached to the I&A shows the property was held by Ivan D. Vagin and Marina B. Vagin as joint tenants. Please confirm whether the deed that was attached to the I&A is the current deed or please file the current deed for the real property. 2) The petition for final distribution must state the date on which notice to the Franchise Tax Board was mailed pursuant to Probate Code 9202(c). [LRSF 14.35 I. 2)] 3) Page 3 of the petition alleges $1,388,358.83 is in 1 Fidelity Bank account. Please explain why Administrator is keeping all cash in the same financial institution when the maximum insured amount is $250,000.00? An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/11/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PETRONI FAMILY MARITAL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Termination Of Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Sections 15403 And 15409
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/20/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Notice does not include the required information from the 10th amended general order for the probate and mental health division found on the court's website. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/4/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF J ANTHONY WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/12/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The proof of publication shows the incorrect name of one of the petitioners and refers to them as "Special Administrator" when no one has been appointed in any capacity yet. Notice of the 4/12/22 hearing must be published correctly. Only one form DE-147S has been filed twice now for just one of the proposed administrators. Courtesy copies of all papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/1/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Notice of Hearing is not the correct form of notice at this initial phase of opening an estate. Furthermore, no notice is required for a supplement to a Petition for Letters of Administration or for a continuance. [CRC 7.53(b) and Probate Code Sect. 1205.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK HOSKING
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/20/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please file a Duties and Liabilities that includes all required information including petitioner's phone number. 2) Please file notice that include the information required by the 10th Amended General Court Order for Probate and Mental health division found on the court's website. 3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 4) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/4/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROSARIO SILVA GOMEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/12/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The age of the minor must be set forth in a supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner. The person having legal custody of the minor, with whom the minor resides, must also be identified in that supplement and that person must receive notice. [CRC 7.5(d).] A courtesy copy of the supplement (and additional proof of service, if applicable) must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/1/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
